name: Goodbye Kansas Group AB (publ)
summary: Goodbye Kansas Group AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, operates as a visualization and extended reality technology company. It develops products and solutions based on Augmented Reality (AR), Virtual Reality, VFX production, cinematics, performance capture and scanning, and digital humans and real time animation. The company also offers virtual training solutions; SaaS solutions in 3D/AR for e-commerce; and location based mobile games, as well as produces 3D animated films. It serves customers in the TV, film, streaming, games, manufacturing, and e-commerce industries. The company was formerly known as Bublar Group AB (publ) and changed its name to Goodbye Kansas Group AB (publ) in May 2021. Goodbye Kansas Group AB (publ) was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
